Subject: Request for Short Extension — Contract Review Deadline

Dear [Counsel's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request a brief one-week extension of our current contract-review deadline, as we are working to complete a thorough review and ensure that all comments are well-considered before circulating them. A small additional window would allow us to deliver more focused and constructive feedback.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether this extension is acceptable, and I am happy to discuss any concerns or alternative timelines. Thank you for your time and consideration, and I appreciate your flexibility.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
